title: Memphis, TN — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Memphis, TN: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Memphis is a city in TN with a population of 621,056. Birthplace of rock ’n’ roll with BBQ, blues on Beale Street, and no state income tax.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
